reviewsSample.text:
56. Abu Al-Trisha: I've been a customer of this company for over 10 years.
But unfortunately, their warranty is not genuine. When something you buy from them breaks, they try in one way or another to evade the warranty, stalling and procrastinating until you get fed up. In the end, you either cancel the warranty or you have a problem with them, and then they become the ones in the right!
The company is excellent, I highly recommend it to everyone.

The person responsible for installing the screen protector is unfortunately incompetent; he doesn't know how to apply it properly, and secondly, he used a screen protector for the wrong device.

The black edges of the protector covered a large part of the screen, and he denies that it's for this device. Even street vendors do better than him. A terrible experience that I won't repeat.

stores.address: PJVG+9WP, Baqubah, Diyala Governorate, Iraq

reviewsSample.text: It is an amazing place for study, the employers and Dr. there are very gentle. the only negative thing about it, is its small area.

A very distinguished location with many beautiful features: - It overlooks the Diyala River in a prime location. - It is located near the two main bridges in the city center. - It is very close to all the active facilities in the center, such as Al-Tabu Street. - It is close to the market center and residential areas. - The college is situated on two very busy streets.

The college building needs development and reconsideration, especially the facade.

It has the potential to have more than one gate, which would improve traffic flow and reduce the congestion caused by the current narrow gate.

#BuildingsFromMyCity

Don't pay attention to what I said above; take it from someone who's been there, not a wise man. I'm a student in this college, English department. My only advice to you is, "University life is great and you won't get another chance, don't ruin it in a college like this."

The College of Religion is so small, it's practically a paradise! You stand by the fountain, we call it the Maldives Islands. You stand by the fountain, the Dean's office is right in front of you, you turn around, the department is behind you, you walk a little further, the cafeteria is right in front of you, you turn around a little further, the sports department is right in front of you. All this scenery while you're standing in the same spot by the fountain! 😂 That's an achievement in itself! It's a small college that needs expansion in every way: the gardens, the departments.
